text:
Created attachment 172469
port source

vlink is a portable linker, written in ANSI-C, that can read and
write a wide range of object- and executable file formats. It can
be used to link a specific target format from several different
input file formats, or for converting, stripping and manipulating
files.

WWW: http://sun.hasenbraten.de/vlink/
